humanSummary.text: Final re-audit found no P0/P1 blockers after dashboard style-guide context repair. Two non-blocking follow-ups remain for explicit standalone route context and missing-context panel behavior.

findings.title: Standalone style-guide builder route defaults missing query params
findings.description: The dashboard embed uses explicit status-derived IDs, but the standalone /style-guide-builder route still has default contract UUIDs when query params are omitted.

evidence.detail: Re-audit found no mixed context for dashboard usage, but stricter standalone route behavior should require explicit branch and policy ids.

findings.impact: Standalone review links can be less explicit than the dashboard embed, which makes route provenance weaker.
actionableAcceptanceCriteria: Standalone /style-guide-builder requests without locale branch id or policy version id return an explicit route diagnostic or unavailable state.
Valid standalone requests preserve the same locale branch and policy ids across route, branch, policy, transcript, validation, and consequences.
Route tests cover missing query params, invalid ids, and valid explicit ids.

proposedDagNode.title: Explicit standalone style-guide builder route context
proposedDagNode.summary: Require explicit locale branch and style-guide policy version context for standalone style-guide builder routes.
acceptanceCriteria: Standalone style-guide builder routes without required locale branch and policy ids do not fall back to contract UUID defaults.
Valid standalone route requests preserve ids across route, branch, policy, transcript, validation, and consequences.
Route tests cover missing query params, invalid ids, and valid explicit ids.

findings.title: Missing style-guide context blocks whole dashboard
findings.description: When selected style-guide context is absent, the dashboard treats it as a whole-dashboard load error rather than rendering the rest of the dashboard with the builder panel unavailable.

evidence.detail: Re-audit found this safe and explicit, but less ergonomic than a panel-scoped unavailable state.

findings.impact: A missing style-guide context can hide unrelated dashboard status that would still be useful to reviewers.
actionableAcceptanceCriteria: Dashboard can render non-style-guide status while the style-guide builder panel shows a scoped unavailable/diagnostic state.
Panel unavailable state explains missing selected locale branch or policy version id.
Existing full-dashboard error handling remains for unrecoverable status load failures.

proposedDagNode.title: Style-guide builder panel unavailable state
proposedDagNode.summary: Render a panel-scoped unavailable state when style-guide context is missing instead of failing the entire dashboard.
deliverables: Missing branch and missing policy fixture tests
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard still renders non-style-guide status when style-guide context is missing.
The style-guide panel unavailable state names the missing selected locale branch or policy version id.
Unrecoverable dashboard status load failures still use the existing full-dashboard error path.
